title: UIAO Image Registry Schema
description: Schema for the canonical UIAO image registry. Governs figures, diagrams, and images that are reusable across multiple documents. Doc-local images (single-use images embedded in exactly one document) are out of scope for this registry and live under the document's own folder. Every registry entry carries full provenance: the prompt file, the prompt hash (sha256), the generator model, the rendered file path, the file hash, and the list of documents/placeholders that reference it. Drift between prompt_sha256 and the hash of prompt_file contents triggers DRIFT-PROVENANCE per UIAO_016 Drift Detection Standard.

metadata.description: Canonical frontmatter per src/uiao/schemas/metadata-schema.json. Required fields: document_id, title, version, status, classification, owner, created_at, updated_at, boundary.

schema-version.description: Semantic version of this registry document schema.

updated.description: ISO 8601 date of the most recent registry update.

images.description: Ordered list of canonical image entries. Order is stable; new entries append at the end.

id.description: Canonical image identifier. Format: UIAO-FIG-NNN (exactly three digits). Stable across versions and reuse sites.

slug.description: Kebab-case human handle. Embedded in filenames and URLs.

title.description: Short human label for indexes and captions.

description.description: One-paragraph description of what the image depicts. Used by search and alt text.

status.description: Lifecycle. draft = pipeline-generated, awaiting human promotion. current = approved for use. deprecated = replaced or retired.

version.description: Semantic major.minor version. Increment major on visual redesign; minor on prompt refinement that preserves composition.

prompt_file.description: Path (repo-relative) to the markdown prompt file for this image. Must exist. Always lives under src/uiao/canon/image-prompts/<id>.md for canon images.

prompt_sha256.description: SHA-256 of the prompt_file contents. Pipeline recomputes and compares on every run; mismatch triggers regeneration (if status: draft) or DRIFT-PROVENANCE (if status: current).

generator.description: Generator model identifier (e.g., gemini-2.5-flash-image). Recorded for reproducibility.

file.description: Path (repo-relative) to the rendered PNG. Always lives under docs/images/canonical/ for canon images. Filename convention: <id>-<slug>.png.

file_sha256.description: SHA-256 of the rendered PNG bytes. The certificate anchor for this image. Distribution tampering is detectable.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the generation run that produced this file.

aspect.description: Locked aspect ratio. Enforced by the pipeline; mismatch fails the run.

palette.description: Optional declared color palette (hex). Used by style-drift checks.

tags.description: Kebab-case thematic tags for discovery. Examples: ['identity', 'zero-trust', 'boundary', 'evidence-chain', 'sase']. Used by the registry search CLI to surface reusable candidates when authors add new IMAGE-PROMPTS.

audience.description: Intended reader profiles. Authors filtering the registry for a new exec brief can narrow to audience=executive; ATS authors narrow to audience=technical.

document_types.description: Customer-documents families (and internal doc families) where this image has been used or is recommended. Drives which families a new placeholder can suggest IMAGE-REF reuse from.

visual_style.description: Dominant visual style. Lets the registry search surface images whose style matches the slot being filled.

themes.description: Free-form subject themes (e.g., 'drift detection', 'certificate anchoring', 'GCC-Moderate boundary'). Richer than tags; used for full-text search.

keywords.description: Free-form search keywords, including product and vendor names, canonical concepts, and synonyms. The registry search tokenizes on these.

alt_text.description: Canonical accessibility alt text. Used by HTML and DOCX alt-text field when the image is referenced via [IMAGE-REF:]. Must describe the image content, not its caption.

caption.description: Canonical caption to use under the image when rendered. Empty = no caption.

related.description: Sibling UIAO-FIG IDs that cover adjacent or complementary subjects. Surfaced by the registry search as 'you might also consider' suggestions.

license.description: License or usage rights for this image. Defaults to the repo LICENSE if omitted. Set explicitly for commissioned artwork or third-party composites.

reuse_score.description: Machine-maintained counter of how many documents reference this image via [IMAGE-REF:]. Populated by the pipeline scanner from len(used_by). Higher = better reuse signal.

used_by.description: Every site that references this image. Populated by the pipeline scanner; hand-editable for bootstrapping.

document.description: Repo-relative path to the .qmd or .md that references this image.

placeholder_id.description: The local placeholder identifier inside the referencing document, e.g., IMAGE-03.

supersedes.description: Optional. If this image replaced an older one, cite the predecessor ID here. The predecessor's status must be deprecated.

superseded_by.description: Required when status: deprecated. Points to the replacement.

notes.description: Optional free-text notes (style guidance, related images, known issues).
